svg:
多頭注意力機制 (Multi-Head Attention)
Input $X$
Head 1 ($Q_1, K_1, V_1$)
<rect x="220" y_250" width="120" height="60" rx="5" fill="#00ffff" fill-opacity="0.2" stroke="#00ffff" stroke-width="1" /> <text x="280" y_285" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="12" fill="#00ffff" text-anchor="middle">Head 2 ($Q_2, K_2, V_2$)
<rect x="220" y_400" width="120" height="60" rx="5" fill="#00ffff" fill_opacity="0.2" stroke="#00ffff" stroke_width="1" /> <text x="280" y_435" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="12" fill="#00ffff" text-anchor="middle">Head 3 ($Q_3, K_3, V_3$)
<text x="450" y_255" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="14" fill="#ff00ff" text-anchor="middle">Concat
<rect x="580" y_220" width="100" height_60" rx="5" fill="#ffffff" fill-opacity_0.1" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="1" /> <text x="630" y_255" font-family="sans-serif" font_size="14" fill="#ffffff" text-anchor="middle">$W^O$
<text x="765" y_255" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="12" fill="#00ff00" text-anchor="middle">Output
<text x="50" y_470" font-family="sans-serif" font_size="14" fill="#aaa" text-anchor="start">Multi-head mechanism: Split $\to$ Parallel Attention $\to$ Concat $\to$ Linear Projection
